title: Sony to Stop Producing Physical Discs for PlayStation in 2028 and PS6 Will Be Completely Digital
summary: The company confirmed the end of discs starting January 2028, and analysts anticipate that the next console will lack an optical drive, which has provoked a strong reaction from the community.

title: Krafton Agrees to Pay $250 Million in Bonuses to Subnautica 2 Developers and CEO Resigns
summary: The legal dispute ends with an agreement that grants bonuses to the entire team and the voluntary departure of Unknown Worlds' CEO.

title: PlayStation to Close Digital Stores for PS3 and PS Vita in July 2027
summary: Sony has set the closure date for the game sales platforms for both consoles, preventing future digital purchases.

title: Mario Kart World Receives New Update with Two Knockout Tour Courses and Improved Photos
summary: Version 1.7.0 introduces new content, item adjustments, and the ability to capture images in more situations.

title: Xbox Tests Conversion of Physical Games to Digital and Considers Removing Disc Drive in Next Generation
summary: Microsoft is developing a tool to digitize physical titles and is evaluating launching a console without an optical drive, according to multiple reports.

title: Metroid Ravenous, Possible New Entry in the Saga, Leaks Through Official Ratings
summary: Several age rating systems have listed the unannounced title, suggesting that Nintendo would release a sequel to Metroid Dread on Switch 2.

title: PlayStation Plus Reveals Free Games for July 2026
summary: Sony offers a high-quality RPG and a minor Call of Duty as the month's titles, along with a third game not yet confirmed.

title: Rhythm Heaven Groove Receives Critical Acclaim for Its Subversive Design and Role in the Twilight of the Switch
summary: Reviews highlight the originality of Nintendo's rhythm game, considered a perfect farewell for the original console.

title: Battlefield 6 Causes Confusion by Applying and Reverting Experience Booster Changes Twice
summary: EA accidentally reverted modifications that improved the progression pace, leaving players unsure which version is correct.

title: Rockstar Accused of Imposing Crunch on GTA 6 and Widening the Gender Pay Gap
summary: Workers at Rockstar North report mandatory excessive overtime and salary differences, while requesting union recognition in the United Kingdom.

title: Microsoft Plans to Close Studios Like Arkane and Sell Blade in Its Restructuring Plan
summary: The tech giant considers eliminating several development teams and divesting intellectual properties, according to internal sources.

title: Eremite Announces a Survival Game in the Universe of Against the Storm While Planning a Sequel
summary: The studio is preparing a survival title set in the infected world of its acclaimed city-builder, with a direct sequel possibly on the horizon.

title: Diablo 4 Season 14 Lightens Annoying Progression and Offers Guide for the Main Quest
summary: The changes reduce the time needed to level up, and players can consult a complete tutorial for the 'Through the Threshold' quest.

title: Godot Bans Use of Autonomous AI Assistants and Mandates Declaration of AI-Generated Content
summary: The open-source game engine implements restrictions to prevent 'vibe-coding' and ensure transparency in the use of AI.

title: Xbox Withdraws Funding for IO Interactive's RPG Project Fantasy and the Studio Is Forced to Lay Off Staff
summary: The cancellation of the publishing agreement causes layoffs at the studio responsible for 007, which loses Microsoft's support for its fantasy title.

title: Bethesda to Release Physical Edition of Oblivion Remastered for Switch 2
summary: The remake of the classic RPG will have a disc version for Nintendo's new console, coinciding with its launch.

title: Ubisoft Barcelona Calls Strikes Amid New Wave of Layoffs
summary: Workers at the Spanish studio begin work stoppages to protest the publisher's mass staff cuts.

title: Total War: Warhammer 3 Deploys Archaon's Apocalyptic Invasion and Overhauls the Vampire Counts
summary: The new update introduces the chaotic end of the world, customized victory conditions, and three champions of Nurgle.

title: Netflix to Adapt Persona as Live-Action Series with Writer from Star Trek: Picard
summary: Atlus's popular franchise will be brought to live-action television by an experienced writer.

title: Helldivers 2 Parodies Trump's Wall in Its New Update 'Frontlines of Freedom'
summary: The shooter launches a campaign to 'make the galaxy safe again' in a clear political satire.
